# Guelph Deck Builder — Deck Building Leads, Guelph, Ontario

> Connects Guelph, Ontario homeowners planning a new deck, deck repair, or composite deck upgrade with a single vetted, exclusive local deck builder. Part of the WeProvideLeads network of local-service lead generation sites serving Guelph, Ontario, Canada.

This site is a lead-generation and referral service, not a deck building company itself. Requests submitted through the contact form are matched with one qualified, exclusive deck builder serving the area. We handle City of Guelph deck permit applications and design drawings; permits are required for most decks attached to a house or over 24 inches above grade.

## Services
- New Deck Construction (pressure treated, composite, PVC)
- Deck Repair & Refinishing
- Composite Decking (Trex, TimberTech, Fiberon)
- Deck Stairs & Railings
- Pergolas & Shade Structures
- Permits & Design

## Service area
Guelph, Fergus, Elora, Rockwood, Erin, Acton, Puslinch, Cambridge, Wellington County

- Home: https://guelphdeckbuilder.com/
- Services: https://guelphdeckbuilder.com/#services
